race.comment: INCREMENTAL (1) wasn't far away on debut when well supported then was poised to strike last start at Newcastle but found one better. Peaking now and gets a key booking in Bullock. Ready. POSHY'S GIRL (4) showed good tactical speed on debut when leading them up on a wet deck at Coffs Harbour, only to be claimed late. Is sure to have come on from that and is drawn favourably. Can go one better. SUTTON STORM (2) caught the eye on debut at Dubbo when closing off strongly into fourth after turning from a rearward position. Better for the experience and should appreciate the added trip. MR BOHEMIAN (8) is a Prague gelding set to debut for the Archibald camp. Showed improvement in his most recent trial and keeps Nock in the saddle. Will need a smart steer from the wide gate but looks capable.
